scripts.build: pnpm --filter @seamshield/rules... run build && pnpm --filter @seamshield/core... run build && pnpm --filter @seamshield/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @seamshield/core test && pnpm --filter @seamshield/cli test
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @seamshield/cli test && pnpm --filter @seamshield/cli pack --dry-run
